description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a robust and angular body, featuring a glossy black exterior finish. The vehicle has four passenger doors, a rear hatch, and prominent roof rails, suggesting utility and cargo capability. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are large with multi-spoke alloy rims, providing a sporty yet practical appearance. The front grille is wide and flanked by sleek headlights, while the rear is equipped with distinctive taillights and a subtle bumper. The side mirrors are streamlined, and the overall stance is elevated, indicating off-road or all-terrain capability. The interior, though not fully visible, likely includes standard seating and dashboard arrangements typical of urban SUVs.
description: A glossy black, mid-sized SUV with four doors, roof rails, and large alloy wheels, designed for both urban and utility use. It features a robust, angular body and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the taillights, rear hatch, roof rails, and right-side doors.
description_view_1: Front three-quarter view highlighting the wide grille, headlights, and left-side doors.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the full length of the SUV, including both right-side doors and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear left three-quarter view focusing on the taillights, rear hatch, and left-side details.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy rims with a silver metallic finish
